title: Require Service Context Boundaries
forbids: a module that establishes a new initial oRPC context or a middleware file that exposes a default export
why: Modules inherit context from the root implementer, and named middleware exports keep composition ownership visible.
remediate: Establish initial context at the root implementer, narrow it through module middleware contributions, and replace middleware default exports with named exports.
message: Service context must flow from the root implementer through named middleware.
